reviews.review_description: This is an amazing game I used to play it because I saw the jmancurly vid I played everyday for abt a year but I quit for a lil and I just went back to it when I used to play I bought the mods but I recently went back it kinda died but it’s still one of the best gtag game honestly might be better than gtag its self.

reviews.review_title: this game used to be fun
reviews.review_description: i remembered when this game was fun, but now this game looked like it had a downgrade in quality, and the mod menu that i paid for was just so laggy it didn't even work and there were only 19 players on when i installed this game, and the conclusion of this is cebus is just not fun anymore and i wish it stayed the same with better and more reasonable updates, instead of them just changing the game.

reviews.review_title: WHAT DID YOU DO TO YOUR GAME VRO🥀
reviews.review_description: Bro I got the latest Christmas update (even though it's past Christmas) And HOLY LAG!!! you can't even walk into the shop without lagging everywhere and buying stuff you don't want to! And whenever I turn to the left on the right side of the map? my headset GLITCHES AND HEATS UP!!! this has GOT TO BE THE WORST update by far! not only that! YOU REMOVED POST PROCESSING AND FORCED IT TO BE USED IN THE SETTINGS IN THE COMPUTER!!! And the mirror quality? 14 NERFS!!! The fps? 14 NERFS! The loading screen? 14 BUFFS! (which is a good thing Tbh 😁) But the Post processing? 14 REMOVES!!! I swear CEBUS... sometimes... You try to make weapons (Like the swords in trusted user) Unique but you make it the same DAM THING! I swear on my life. The only reason this is a 2-star and not a one is because of that loading screen, Otherwise. You'd be cooked

reviews.review_title: The game is good, but the modders no
reviews.review_description: These modders on here or just super annoying, and plus if these mods get put into the wrong hands, it can get really bad and this was a popular game. I liked it like I had all I had some bundles and had fun with it, but that you stupid modders are everywhere and it’s super annoying the game otherwise is great, but please bring back the original horror map instead of changing it every year cause I remember when they used to be levels and that was actually fun and scary and just in general, this is a good game. It’s just the modders really really need to get fixed. I figured out right now and I legit wish this game was more popular. It’s sad that it’s not. ￼
